content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Magic Gems". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1117/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of gems. The next line contains n integers, the colors of the gems.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of operations required to make all gems the same color.

solution.approach: Use a graph to model the gems and their colors. Then use BFS or DFS to find the minimum number of operations required to make all gems the same color.
